name: TextComponent
description: Text component for displaying text content with optional line clamping, hyphenation, and expand/collapse functionality.

inputs.name: expandable
inputs.description: Displays "more"/"less" links to expand/collapse text. Requires `maxLines` to be set.

inputs.name: hyphenation
inputs.description: Controls hyphenation behavior using CSS `hyphens` property.

inputs.name: isCollapsed
inputs.description: Controls collapsed/expanded state. Two-way bindable via `[(isCollapsed)]`.

inputs.name: maxLines
inputs.description: Maximum number of visible lines before text is clamped. Set to `null` to disable.

inputs.name: whitespaces
inputs.description: Preserves whitespace and line breaks using CSS `white-space: pre-wrap`.

outputs.name: isCollapsedChange
outputs.description: Controls collapsed/expanded state. Two-way bindable via `[(isCollapsed)]`.
